title: Bonney Meets the Crew
description: On pages 4–6, this part focuses on Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Jinbe, Unknown person #6, York, Luffy as The Straw Hats reach Egghead, meet Bonney, and discover Vegapunk’s impossible future island while Law is drawn into Blackbeard’s ambush.
scene: The Straw Hats reach Egghead, meet Bonney, and discover Vegapunk’s impossible future island while Law is drawn into Blackbeard’s ambush.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: That noise... It sounded like an explosion!!

dialogue.speaker: Jinbe
dialogue.text: Luffy!! Chopper!! Don't worry, I'm here!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: HANG ON, YOU THREE! WE'RE HEADING UP!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Oh my!! What a tremendous current!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Steering a ship in this is next to impossible!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The waves are too strong!! We can't get back up!!

summary: This part advances the Egghead Opening through 20 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
